tools.name: get_github_user_summary
tools.description: Authenticate to the GitHub REST API using a personal access token stored in 1Password, and return a compact dict with: the authenticated user's login, their public_repos count, and the names of their 5 most-recently-updated repositories. The token is read internally via forge_id and never exposed.

tools.name: fetch_hn_front_page
tools.description: Fetch the Hacker News front page (https://news.ycombinator.com/), parse the HTML, and return a list of the top N stories, each as a compact dict with: title (str), points (int), and domain (str). Uses httpx to fetch and BeautifulSoup to parse.
